sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) CFO Sells $587,573.25 in Stock
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) CFO Stefan Murry sold 11,693 shares of company stock for a total of $587,573.25, reducing his ownership by 3.88%. Following the transaction, Murry directly owns 290,050 shares. The company's stock traded down $0.09 to $48.40 on Wednesday, with a market cap of $3.30 billion and a P/E ratio of -15.03.

feed.title: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) Insider Sells $876,319.39 in Stock
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics (NASDAQ:AAOI) Director David Kuo sold 17,467 shares of the company's stock on February 11th, 2026, for a total of $876,319.39. This transaction reduced his ownership by 13.53%. The stock traded down 0.2% to $48.40, and analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $35.60.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. Reduces Position in Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. $HII
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) by 62.5% in Q3, selling 18,707 shares and retaining 11,242 shares valued at $3.237 million. Despite the reduction by one institutional investor, others like Geneos Wealth Management and IFP Advisors increased their holdings, and institutional investors collectively own 90.46% of the company's stock. Huntington Ingalls recently exceeded earnings expectations, with an EPS of $4.04 against an estimated $3.72, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. Has $4.03 Million Holdings in NRG Energy, Inc. $NRG
feed.summary: Oppenheimer Asset Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in NRG Energy, Inc. during the third quarter, now holding 24,896 shares valued at $4.03 million. This comes as NRG Energy authorized a $3.0 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend. Despite some insider selling totaling over $30 million, institutional investors and hedge funds maintain a strong presence in the company.

feed.title: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. Sells 24,110 Shares of Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. reduced its stake in Devon Energy Corporation ($DVN) by 14.4%, selling 24,110 shares, but still holds 142,816 shares valued at over $5 million. Hedge funds and institutions collectively own about 69.72% of the company, which is expected to report Q4 earnings with a potential year-over-year EPS decline of 25.9%. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with some price target increases and decreases, though the average rating remains a "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: How Did Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey Deliver In Last Year?
feed.summary: Coca-Cola closed 2025 with modest revenue growth and steady volume trends, despite some one-time charges and currency headwinds, marking James Quincey's final results as CEO before stepping down. Henrique Braun is set to succeed him on March 31, inheriting a company focused on continued expansion and anticipating 4-5% organic revenue growth in 2026. The company successfully executed its strategy in a complex environment, achieving initial guidance and maintaining strong cash flow generation, including 63 consecutive years of dividend increases.

feed.title: Entergy: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Entergy Corp. (ETR) reported a fourth-quarter profit of $240.5 million, translating to 51 cents per share, which matched Wall Street expectations. The power company's revenue for the quarter was $2.96 billion, surpassing forecasts. For the full year, Entergy recorded a profit of $1.77 billion, or $3.91 per share, on revenue of $12.95 billion, and anticipates full-year earnings in the range of $4.25 to $4.45 per share.

feed.title: Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) Upgraded at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has upgraded Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) to a "Hold" rating. The company currently has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $78.79. Shares opened at $76.47, near their 52-week high, with a market capitalization of $13.99 billion.

feed.title: Pentair CFO team hits Citi and Barclays investor conferences in Miami
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR) announced that its Executive Vice President and CFO, Bob Fishman (outgoing), and incoming CFO, Nick Brazis, along with EVP De’Mon Wiggins, will present at Citi’s 2026 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference and Barclays Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami. The presentations are scheduled for February 18th and 19th, 2026, respectively, and will be webcast live on Pentair's investor relations website, with replays available afterward. Pentair emphasizes its role as a leader in sustainable water solutions, reporting approximately $4.2 billion in revenue in 2025.

feed.title: BRAEMAR HOTELS & RESORTS (NYSE:BHR) Upgraded to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research upgraded Braemar Hotels & Resorts (NYSE:BHR) from "strong sell" to "hold" on Tuesday, while Weiss Ratings reaffirmed a "sell (d+)," resulting in a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Reduce." The company, which is a publicly traded REIT focused on luxury hotels, trades at $3.04 with a negative P/E and high debt-to-equity. Institutional investors and hedge funds hold a significant portion of the stock, with some recently increasing their positions.

feed.title: CarMax Names Keith Barr as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. announced the appointment of Keith Barr as President and Chief Executive Officer, effective March 16, 2026. Barr previously served as CEO of InterContinental Hotels Group and is expected to lead CarMax into its next phase of growth by focusing on customer experience, digital transformation, and brand loyalty. David McCreight will return to his role as an independent Director of the Board, and Tom Folliard will resume his duties as non-executive Chair after the June 2026 Annual Meeting.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) Upgraded at DZ Bank
feed.summary: DZ Bank has upgraded Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) to a "strong sell" rating, a contrarian view amidst a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $212.92. This comes despite TXN shares trading near a one-year high of $226.56 and other analysts raising their price targets. The company recently slightly missed quarterly earnings expectations but has positive long-term sentiment due to strong growth stock characteristics, macro tailwinds, and benefits from data-center demand, though it faces risks related to international sales.

feed.title: Brown & Brown taps $1.5B buyback plan with $250M deal
feed.summary: Brown & Brown, Inc. announced an accelerated share repurchase (ASR) program with Bank of America for $250 million of its common stock. This ASR is part of a larger $1.5 billion board-approved buyback authorization from October 2025. The company's stock activity and recent financial performance are provided as context, including strong 2025 revenues.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (VNT) Vontier Corporation Reports Q4 Revenue $808.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $764.7M
feed.summary: Vontier Corporation (VNT) reported strong Q4 revenue of $808.5 million, significantly surpassing the FactSet estimate of $764.7 million. The company also provided forward-looking guidance, expecting full-year 2026 adjusted EPS in the range of $3.35 to $3.50 and Q1 EPS between $0.78 and $0.81. These results indicate a positive financial performance for the industrial technology company.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences stock price target raised to $170 from $155 at Wolfe Research
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) to $170.00 from $155.00, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment is based on the strong performance of Gilead's HIV franchise in 2025, including the significant growth of Descovy and successful launch of Yeztugo. Despite potential headwinds from US policy impacts, the firm anticipates robust growth from key HIV products, while analysts forecast Gilead to be profitable in fiscal 2026 with an EPS of $8.76.

feed.title: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: APA Corporation (NASDAQ:APA) has received an average "Hold" recommendation from 28 brokerages, with opinions ranging from "sell" to "buy." The average 12-month price target for APA shares is $26.3478. The article also details recent analyst reports, stock performance metrics, dividend announcements, and institutional investments in the company.

feed.title: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans Has $1.94 Million Stock Position in Assurant, Inc. $AIZ
feed.summary: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans has reduced its stake in Assurant, Inc. by 41.7%, selling 6,416 shares and leaving them with 8,969 shares valued at approximately $1.94 million. This comes as Assurant reported strong Q4 results, beating earnings per share and revenue estimates, benefiting from lower catastrophe losses. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $252.67.

feed.title: RFG Advisory LLC Sells 14,986 Shares of PulteGroup, Inc. $PHM

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Sells 20,242 Shares of Brink's Company (The) $BCO
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. has reduced its stake in Brink's Company by 17.7%, selling 20,242 shares but still retaining a significant holding worth approximately $11.01 million. This comes as Brink's has seen increased analyst optimism, with Weiss Ratings upgrading the stock to a "buy" and Truist raising its price target to $163. The company also authorized a $750 million share repurchase program and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Trims Position in OFG Bancorp $OFG

Despite several analysts categorizing the stock as a "Hold," OFG Bancorp has increased its quarterly dividend to $0.35 and authorized a $200 million share buyback program.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Grows Position in Customers Bancorp, Inc $CUBI

Customers Bancorp has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a price target of $87.80, and recently announced a $100 million share buyback program.

feed.title: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans Lowers Stock Holdings in Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated $PEG

Despite this large reduction by one fund, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for PEG with an average target price of $90.96. Public Service Enterprise Group also recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.63, representing a 3.0% yield and a 60.6% payout ratio.

feed.title: Savant Capital LLC Has $720,000 Stock Position in MarketAxess Holdings Inc. $MKTX

The company also announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.78 per share.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT (NYSE:ARR) Stock Crosses Above 200-Day Moving Average - Here's Why
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT (NYSE:ARR) recently saw its stock price cross above its 200-day moving average, a bullish technical indicator. Despite a generous monthly dividend yield of 16.3%, concerns exist regarding its sustainability due to an unusually high 7,200% payout ratio. Analyst consensus is "Hold" with a modest price target, and recent insider selling has also been noted.

feed.title: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans Decreases Holdings in Quest Diagnostics Incorporated $DGX
feed.summary: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans reduced its stake in Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (DGX) by 58.3% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 14,080 shares and holding 10,087 shares valued at $1.922 million. This move comes as company insiders, including CEO J. E. Davis, have also been net sellers of the stock. Despite insider selling and a 2026 EPS guidance that fell below some estimates, Quest Diagnostics reported strong Q4 results, a $1.0 billion share buyback, and a 7.5% dividend increase.

feed.title: Alta Equipment Group Inc. (NYSE:ALTG) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Alta Equipment Group Inc. (NYSE:ALTG) has received an average "Hold" rating from analysts, with a consensus 12-month price target of $11.00. Recent analyst reports show mixed ratings ranging from "sell" to "strong buy." Insider activity includes a director acquiring 40,000 shares, and institutional investors have also modified their holdings in the company.

feed.title: RFG Advisory LLC Has $1.20 Million Stake in Danaher Corporation $DHR
feed.summary: RFG Advisory LLC significantly reduced its stake in Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) by 54.8% in Q3, selling 7,311 shares and holding 6,027 shares valued at approximately $1.20 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have recently acquired positions in Danaher, and company insiders own 11.10% of the stock. Danaher reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $253.86.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Has $10.95 Million Stock Holdings in ONE Gas, Inc. $OGS
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. significantly reduced its stake in ONE Gas, Inc. by 25.7% in Q3, now holding 135,219 shares valued at $10.95 million. Despite mixed analyst ratings, ONE Gas recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.68, offering an annualized payout of $2.72 with a yield of approximately 3.3%. Institutional investors collectively own 88.71% of the company's stock.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Acquires 83,305 Shares of Rxo Inc $RXO
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. increased its stake in RXO by 11.8%, acquiring 83,305 additional shares to hold a total of 791,799 shares valued at $12.18 million. This move comes as RXO reported weak Q4 results, missing EPS estimates and experiencing an 11.9% year-over-year revenue decline, which led to a stock sell-off. Analysts have mixed sentiments on RXO, with some being bullish after the company priced a $400M senior notes offering to boost liquidity, while others remain cautious.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Expands Home Ecosystem With Bidirectional EV Charging Progress
feed.summary: Enphase Energy is advancing its IQ Bidirectional EV Charging Platform, conducting technical demonstrations and preparing for volume production across the US and Europe. This initiative aims to integrate EV charging with home energy systems, supporting both vehicle-to-home and vehicle-to-grid applications. The development expands Enphase's ecosystem beyond its core microinverters and batteries, potentially creating new revenue streams and strengthening its position in residential solar, storage, and EV energy management.

feed.title: Huntington Cincinnati president says bank has big local growth plans after acquisitions
feed.summary: Huntington National Bank's Cincinnati president, Jim Danneman, announced the bank's ambitious growth plans for Greater Cincinnati following recent acquisitions. This strategic push comes even as a local rival has also completed a significant deal. The bank aims to expand its presence in the region.

feed.title: News Corp Highlights Ongoing $1 Billion Share Repurchase
feed.summary: News Corp has reconfirmed its $1 billion share repurchase program for Class A and Class B common shares, initiated on July 15, 2025. This buyback program, executed via Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, is designed to return capital to investors and enhance shareholder value, without requiring specific shareholder approval. While market conditions and alternative uses of capital will influence the actual repurchase levels, one analyst currently rates NWSA stock as a Buy with a $39.00 price target.

feed.title: Vontier Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
feed.summary: Vontier (NYSE: VNT) released its Q4 earnings report, surpassing estimated earnings per share (EPS) by 1.18% with an EPS of $0.86 against an estimate of $0.85. The company's revenue increased by $31.70 million compared to the previous year. For Q1 2026, Vontier's management is forecasting earnings to be between $0.78 and $0.81 per share.

feed.title: Tractor Supply looks to take on final-mile deliveries (TSCO:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) is implementing a multi-year, hub-based final-mile delivery strategy to significantly reduce freight costs. This strategy involves bringing most large-item deliveries in-house while continuing to utilize gig and parcel partners to improve service and lower expenses. The company anticipates major savings as a result of these changes.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) Will Pay A Dividend Of $0.155
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (NASDAQ:HBAN) has declared a dividend of $0.155 per share, resulting in a 3.5% dividend yield, which is typical for its industry. The company has a long history of paying dividends, with a payout ratio of 44%, indicating good coverage by earnings. Analysts forecast a 48.4% EPS growth for the next three years, potentially leading to a 35% payout ratio, which bodes well for the dividend's future.

feed.title: PG&E shares fall 2% as Q4 earnings miss overshadows 2026 guidance By Investing.com
feed.summary: PG&E Corporation's shares fell 2.11% in pre-market trading after the company reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $0.36 per share, missing analyst estimates of $0.37. Despite the earnings miss, PG&E tightened its 2026 non-GAAP core earnings guidance to $1.64-$1.66 per share, which is above the analyst consensus of $1.60. The company also highlighted operational achievements including a reduction in operating costs and improved systemwide reliability.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM Shares Sold by Peterson Wealth Services
feed.summary: Peterson Wealth Services significantly reduced its stake in JPMorgan Chase & Co. by 87% in Q3, selling 44,491 shares and retaining 6,646 shares worth approximately $2.10 million. Additionally, company insiders, including COO Jennifer Piepszak and CFO Jeremy Barnum, sold a total of 14,868 shares, representing about a 10% reduction in their individual holdings. Despite these sales, JPMorgan Chase reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $340.18.

feed.title: AI beneath the surface: SLB and NVIDIA advance subsurface intelligence
feed.summary: SLB and NVIDIA are collaborating to develop a seismic foundation model specifically for the energy industry, moving beyond general-purpose large language models. This partnership leverages domain-specific AI trained on extensive subsurface datasets to improve exploration, anomaly detection, and 4D reservoir monitoring. Their efforts focus on using advanced computing, secure data frameworks, and agentic AI to facilitate faster, more informed decision-making and build the next generation of subsurface intelligence.

feed.title: West Pharma shares climb over 5% on strong fourth-quarter results
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 results, significantly beating analyst expectations with adjusted EPS of $2.04 and revenue of $805 million. The company's High-Value Product Components business was a key driver of growth, leading to a 5.62% increase in shares during pre-market trading. West Pharma also provided an optimistic outlook for fiscal 2026, projecting higher adjusted EPS and net sales than market consensus.

feed.title: Exclusive | CarMax Taps Hotel Veteran to Lead Turnaround
feed.summary: CarMax, the largest used-car retailer, is bringing in former IHG Hotels & Resorts CEO Keith Barr to lead a turnaround. Barr, expected to be announced Thursday and start in March, will focus on improving online sales and reducing costs for vehicle acquisition and reconditioning. This leadership change comes as CarMax's sales have stalled since 2022 and its previous CEO departed in November.

feed.title: SK Group nears $1.3 bn renewable energy asset sale to KKR, set to form JV
feed.summary: SK Group is reportedly nearing a deal to sell a portfolio of its renewable energy assets to KKR & Co. for approximately $1.3 billion. This move is part of SK Group's broader restructuring efforts to strengthen its balance sheet and improve management efficiency. Following the transaction, SK Group units and KKR are expected to inject fresh capital into a joint venture.

feed.title: 2 Reasons to Like ELV (and 1 Not So Much)
feed.summary: Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) has shown strong market performance, aligning with the S&P 500, and possesses significant advantages like economies of scale and a stellar return on invested capital (ROIC) of 27.2%. However, the company faces a challenge with a declining customer base, averaging 1.2% year-on-year declines over the past two years, signaling potential product weakness, increased competition, or market saturation. Despite this, the article concludes that its merits generally outweigh its flaws, but encourages investors to review a comprehensive report to determine if it's the right time to buy.

feed.title: New York State Common Retirement Fund Trims Stock Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOGL
feed.summary: The New York State Common Retirement Fund reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) by 1.1% in Q3, selling 86,383 shares but still holding 7,445,480 shares valued at $1.81 billion, making it their 6th largest holding. Alongside this institutional activity, corporate insiders, including CEO Sundar Pichai, have also been net sellers of Alphabet stock, selling over 2 million shares worth approximately $105 million in the last three months. Market sentiment for Alphabet is mixed, with positive catalysts like analyst price target raises and EU approval of a major acquisition, balanced by concerns over significant bond issuance for AI infrastructure and ongoing privacy/regulatory headlines.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS) Stock's 27% Dive Might Signal An Opportunity But It Requires Some Scrutiny
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) has experienced a significant 27% share price drop in the last month, contributing to a 33% decline over the past year. Despite this, its price-to-sales (P/S) ratio of 2.4x is comparable to the industry median. Analysts forecast an 11% annual revenue growth for FIS over the next three years, higher than the industry's 9.1%, suggesting the market might be pricing in certain risks that prevent its P/S from reflecting this positive outlook.

feed.title: Rollins slides nearly 15% premarket after Q4 miss
feed.summary: Rollins' stock dropped almost 15% in premarket trading following a miss on its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported adjusted EPS of $0.16, falling short of the consensus estimate of $0.19, and revenue reached $762.6 million, missing the $770.81 million estimate. This performance contrasts with strong growth in the prior year's fourth quarter, leading to a significant premarket decline.

feed.title: Zalando upgraded to “equal-weight” by Morgan Stanley as risk-reward stabilizes
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley upgraded Zalando SE to "equal-weight" from "underweight," citing a more balanced risk-reward profile after the stock's nearly 50% fall in the last 12 months. The brokerage set a price target of €23, noting that Zalando now trades at about 13x price-to-earnings on 2027 estimates, comparable to global logistics and e-commerce peers. Despite increased competition from social commerce and AI-driven platforms, Morgan Stanley believes the multiple compression has run its course.

feed.title: Paychex CEO talks about plans for Paycor’s former Norwood headquarters
feed.summary: John Gibson, CEO of Paychex, announced plans for Paycor's former Norwood headquarters. This disclosure was made during the opening of Paycor's new downtown headquarters and training center. The article, however, does not reveal what those plans are.

feed.title: Uncovering Opportunities in Emerging Market Debt
feed.summary: Samy Muaddi, CFA, highlights emerging market bonds as an attractive investment for financing infrastructure, creating employment, and broadening the tax base in developing countries. He emphasizes T. Rowe Price's team approach, leveraging diverse professionals, extensive site visits, and deep local insights to make informed investment decisions that go beyond just the financial numbers. The firm focuses on the complex interplay of society, business, politics, and culture to find value and foster economic development.

feed.title: GM files second patent lawsuit against LKQ, Keystone
feed.summary: General Motors has filed a second patent lawsuit against LKQ and Keystone Automotive Industries, along with other defendants, alleging infringement on 20 GM patents related to Chevrolet and GMC vehicle parts. This new suit comes after LKQ and Keystone previously sued GM for patent infringement. GM is seeking treble damages, a reasonable royalty, and attorney fees, and has demanded a jury trial.

feed.title: Land ahoy! Cruise ships now come with their own ‘private’ islands
feed.summary: Major cruise lines like MSC, Norwegian, and Carnival are investing significantly in private island resorts, primarily in the Caribbean, to offer exclusive experiences for their passengers. These resorts provide a taste of luxury beach holidays, with Royal Caribbean also expanding to locations like Santorini and Cozumel, enhancing the cruise experience with dedicated island escapes.
